kept.text:
To recap:

- Phillies get shut out by the Marlins, 4-0

- 76ers win Game 7 in Boston and complete the 3-1 comeback

- Flyer shutout in Game 1 against the Hurricanes

I'll say a Game 7 win to complete a historic comeback against the team that has tormented you for decades is worth 3 wins total, so the final tally is 3 wins, 2 losses 😂

Best of luck out there to all the Philly fans 🫡
